title: ButterSweet Sous-Vide
description: A silky and spicy Ukrainian dish featuring butter and sugar-free ingredients prepared using sous-vide technology.

ingredients.name: spices
ingredients.notes: A mix of paprika, cayenne pepper and ground coriander

instructions: Cut the butter into small pieces.
Mix sugar and spices in a bowl until well combined. Add the cut butter, stir gently but thoroughly.
Place the mixture in a sous-vide bag with water bath for about 30 minutes at the pre-set temperature.
Remove from the water bath and let it cool down to room temperature.
Gently fold the mixture into whipped cream or yogurt for added texture and cooling effect.
Serve immediately as a dessert or as an accompaniment to fruits or desserts.
